verses.text: Pasian aw, keima Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah kong zong a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang kong deih hi. Tui omlohna gamkeu bangin ka pumpi bup in nang hong deih hi
Tua ahih manin biakinn sungah nangmahmah leh na vangliatna na minthan'nate kei hong musak in
Nuntakna sangin nangma itna kip hoihzaw ahih manin nangmah ka hong phat ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin ka nuntak laiteng nang kong phat ding a, ka khutte hong laam to-in thu kong ngen ding hi
Ka lupna tungah nangmah hong ngaihsunsunin, zanthapai-in kong lungngaihngaih ciangin guhngek leh sathau ne bangin ka lung taii mahmah a, lungdam mahmahna tawh nangmah phatna la ka sa ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huhpa na hi a, nangma hutna sungah lungdamin la ka sa hi
Nangmah ka hong bel a, nangma taklam khut in keimah a hong len hi
Ahi zongin thah dingin kei a hong zongte, lei thukpi sungah paisuk ding uh hi
Galsungah amaute si ding uh a, ngiate' an suak ding uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian' hangin kumpipa lungdam ding a, Pasian tawh thuciamna a nei khempeuhte zong minthang ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh zuauthu a gen kam khempeuh kihubing ding hi.
